name: elasticsearch
description: Elasticsearch MCP Server for interacting with your Elasticsearch data via natural language.

settings.name: Elasticsearch URL
settings.description: The URL of your Elasticsearch cluster (e.g., http://localhost:9200).

settings.name: Elasticsearch API Key
settings.description: API key for authentication (optional if using username/password).

settings.name: Elasticsearch Username
settings.description: Username for basic authentication (optional if using API key).

settings.name: Elasticsearch Password
settings.description: Password for basic authentication (optional if using API key).

settings.name: Skip SSL Verification
settings.description: Set to 'true' to skip SSL/TLS certificate verification.
